description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named clang that runs on every push to master and development branches and on pull requests to master. The workflow should have multiple jobs for building and testing with Clang on various platforms and C++ standards, including C++11, C++14, C++17, and C++20, with and without STL, and on Linux and OSX. Each job should check out the code, build with cmake and Clang, and run tests.
